echarts

发表于 2019-05-04 | 分类于 前端 | | 阅读次数
echarts 学习笔记
echarts中实现热力图多图并排显示(四个)

//以下代码可以直接放到echarts 官网实例中运行测试
app.title = '笛卡尔坐标系上的热力图';
// 模拟x 轴 y 轴
var xZhou = [ 'S','M', 'T','W', 'T','F', 'S'];
var yZhou = ['M', 'A', 'M', 'F', 'J'];

//data模拟数据1 data2模拟数据1 用于series中的data赋值
var data = [
    [0,0,5],[0,1,1],[0,2,2],[0,3,3],[0,4,4],[0,5,5],
    [0,6,6],[1,0,5],[1,1,1],[1,2,2],[1,3,3],[1,4,4],[1,5,5], [1,6,6]
    ,[2,2,5],[2,1,1],[2,0,2],[2,3,3],[2,4,4],[2,5,5], [2,6,6]
    ,[3,0,5],[3,1,1],[3,2,2],[3,3,3],[3,4,4],[3,5,5], [3,6,6]
    ,[4,0,5],[4,1,1],[4,2,2],[4,3,3],[4,4,4],[4,5,5], [4,6,6]
];

var data2 = [
    [0,0,5],[0,1,1],[0,2,2],[0,3,3],[0,4,4],[0,5,5],
    [0,6,6],[1,0,5],[1,1,1],[1,2,2],[1,3,3],[1,4,4],[1,5,5], [1,6,6]
    ,[2,2,5],[2,1,1],[2,0,2],[2,3,3],[2,4,4],[2,5,5], [2,6,6]
    ,[3,0,5],[3,1,1],[3,2,2],[3,3,3],[3,4,4],[3,5,5], [3,6,6]
    ,[4,0,5],[4,1,1],[4,2,2],[4,3,3],[4,4,4],[4,5,5], [4,6,6]
];

//把数据转换成图表想要的数据
data = data.map(function (item) {
    return [item[1], item[0], item[2] || '-'];
});

data2 = data2.map(function (item) {
    return [item[1], item[0], item[2] || '-'];
});

option = {
    tooltip: {
        position: 'top'
    },
    animation: false,
    grid: [ //有几个图表就写几个
            {width:200,height:150,padding:0},
            {width:200,height:150,left: '35%'},
            {width:200,height:150,left: '60%'},
            {width:200,height:150,left: '85%'}
    ],
    xAxis:[//x轴 有几个图表写几个，gridIndex 对应上面的grid 里面的对象索引
         {
        type: 'category',
        data: xZhou,
        gridIndex: 0,
        splitArea: {
            show: true
        },
        position:'top',//x 轴上面显示
        show:true,
        //去除网格线
        splitLine:{show: true},
        nameTextStyle:{
          color:'#abb8ce'  
        },
        axisLabel: {
            color:'#000000',
            interval:0,
            rotate:40
        },
        axisTick:{
            show:false
        },
        axisLine:{
            show:false
        }
    }, {
        type: 'category',
        data: xZhou,
        gridIndex: 1,
        splitArea: {
            show: true
        },
        position:'top',
        show:true,
        splitLine:{show: true},
        nameTextStyle:{
          color:'#abb8ce'  
        },
        axisLabel: {
            color:'#000000',
            interval:0,
            rotate:40
        },
        axisTick:{
            show:false
        },
        axisLine:{
            show:false
        }
    },
    {
        type: 'category',
        data: xZhou,
        gridIndex: 2,
        splitArea: {
            show: true
        },
       position:'top',
        show:true,
        splitLine:{show: true},
        nameTextStyle:{
          color:'#abb8ce'  
        },
        axisLabel: {
            color:'#000000',
            interval:0,
            rotate:40
        },
        axisTick:{
            show:false
        },
        axisLine:{
            show:false
        }
    },
    {
        type: 'category',
        data: xZhou,
        gridIndex: 3,
        splitArea: {
            show: true
        },
        position:'top',
        show:true,
        splitLine:{show: true},
        nameTextStyle:{
          color:'#abb8ce'  
        },
        axisLabel: {
            color:'#000000',
            interval:0,
            rotate:40
        },
        axisTick:{
            show:false
        },
        axisLine:{
            show:false
        }
    }],
    yAxis: [{//y轴 有几个图表写几个，gridIndex 对应上面的grid 里面的对象索引
        type: 'category',
        data: yZhou,
        gridIndex: 0,
        show: true,
        splitLine:{show: false},   //去除网格线
        nameTextStyle:{
            color:'#abb8ce'
        },
        axisLabel: {
            color:'#000000',
            /*margin: 2*/
        },
        axisTick:{ //y轴刻度线
            show:false
        },
        axisLine:{ //y轴
            show:false
        }
    },
    {
        type: 'category',
        data: yZhou,
        gridIndex: 1,
        show: true,
        splitLine:{show: false},   //去除网格线
        nameTextStyle:{
            color:'#abb8ce'
        },
        axisLabel: {
            color:'#000000',
            /*margin: 2*/
        },
        axisTick:{ //y轴刻度线
            show:false
        },
        axisLine:{ //y轴
            show:false
        }
        
    },
    {
        type: 'category',
        data: yZhou,
        gridIndex: 2,
        show: true,
        splitLine:{show: false},   //去除网格线
        nameTextStyle:{
            color:'#abb8ce'
        },
        axisLabel: {
            color:'#000000',
            /*margin: 2*/
        },
        axisTick:{ //y轴刻度线
            show:false
        },
        axisLine:{ //y轴
            show:false
        }
        
    },
    {
        type: 'category',
        data: yZhou,
        gridIndex: 3,
        show: true,
        splitLine:{show: false},   //去除网格线
        nameTextStyle:{
            color:'#abb8ce'
        },
        axisLabel: {
            color:'#000000',
            /*margin: 2*/
        },
        axisTick:{ //y轴刻度线
            show:false
        },
        axisLine:{ //y轴
            show:false
        }
        
    }
    ],
    visualMap: {
       type: 'piecewise',
       orient: 'horizontal',
        pieces: [//自定义图表legend显示的文字
            {min: 8, max: 10, label: '10 到 200'},
            {min: 4, max: 8, label: '10 到 200'},
            {min: 2, max: 4, label: '10 到 200'},
            {min: 0, max: 2, label: '0~100'}
        ]
    },
    series: [{
        name: 'Punch Card',
        type: 'heatmap',
        xAxisIndex: 0,
        yAxisIndex: 0,
        data: data
    },
    {
        name: 'Punch Card2',
        type: 'heatmap',
        xAxisIndex: 1,
        yAxisIndex: 1,
         data: data2
    },
    {
        name: 'Punch Card3',
        type: 'heatmap',
        xAxisIndex: 2,
        yAxisIndex: 2,
         data: data2
    },
    {
        name: 'Punch Card3',
        type: 'heatmap',
        xAxisIndex: 3,
        yAxisIndex: 3,
         data: data2
    }
    ]
};
# 前端
Java 反射
Docker For Windows
